title: FilmPermit
description: An issued NYC film/photography location permit — one row of the famous 'Film Permits' dataset (tg4x-b46p), one of the most-viewed assets in NYC Open Data (~530k views, updated daily). The public record of a shoot the Mayor's Office of Media & Entertainment Film Office greenlit: what type of production, when, and which streets it holds. Keyed on EventID.

eventAgency.description: Issuing agency ('EventAgency') — 'Mayor's Office of Film, Theatre & Broadcasting'.

subCategoryName.description: Production sub-category ('SubCategoryName') — e.g. Feature, Episodic series, Cable-episodic, Signed Not Aired, Commercial, Documentary.

parkingHeld.description: The exact street segments reserved for the shoot ('ParkingHeld') — the ScreenActivity location detail, e.g. 'VARICK STREET between CANAL STREET and LAIGHT STREET'.
